result.summary: Found 4 issues on the BetRivers Pennsylvania casino page, including truncated navigation items, partially cut-off game cards, and missing game thumbnails.

issues.description: The horizontal navigation tab bar is clipping content on the right side — 'Hot Ga...' tab label is cut off, indicating the nav items overflow beyond the viewport without proper scrolling indication.
issues.suggestion: Add a visible scroll indicator (e.g., a gradient fade or arrow) on the right edge of the tab bar to signal that more tabs are available, or reduce tab padding to fit more items.

issues.description: Game cards in both 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections are visually cut off on the right edge — partial game thumbnails (e.g., 'Magni...', 'Munc...', 'Hyperc...', 'Dark Wate...') are visible but clipped, with no scroll affordance shown.
issues.suggestion: Add a horizontal scroll indicator or arrow control to communicate that the row is scrollable, or clip the partial cards more cleanly with a gradient mask to suggest scrollability.

issues.description: Game titles on the right-edge cards are truncated (e.g., 'MAGNI PHO...', 'MUNC MI...', 'HYPERC...', 'DARK WATE...'), making them unreadable and potentially confusing to users.
issues.suggestion: Ensure at least 50% of a card is visible when cut off so users can identify it, or use a fade/mask effect to more clearly indicate the card continues off-screen.

issues.description: The bottom two rows of 'Top Played New Games' are partially cut off at the bottom of the viewport without a clear visual cue that more content exists below.
issues.suggestion: Add a 'See All' CTA or a visible scroll indicator at the bottom of the section to help users understand there is more content to scroll to.
